body:
🔓 VIP SETUP — LONG SKRUSDT (Bitunix · 15m)
ID: SKR-L-20260628

Structure: after the drop from 0.00896, price pulled back into the 0.786–1.0 fib zone and is holding the rising trendline (ascending support off the June 27 lows). Above the 0.008332 swing low the higher-low structure stays intact — a bounce off this confluence is the trigger.

🔺 Bias: Long on the bounce from support
🎯 Entry zone: 0.00840 – 0.00847 (0.786 fib + rising trendline)
🛑 Invalidation (SL): 0.00830 — below the swing low / trendline break
🎯 Targets: TP1 0.00864 (0.5 fib) · TP2 0.00875 (0.382 fib) · TP3 0.00881 (0.236 fib)

This is the full call — your room, first. Manage your own size: 15m timeframe, keep risk tight and trail your stop as it works. Study the idea and trade your own plan, never blindly.

#Signal
